label: Granola
description: Arcade tools for Granola meeting intelligence (public Enterprise API)

tools.name: GetMeeting
tools.description:
Get full metadata for one Granola meeting by its note ID.

Does not return notes or transcript content. Use get_meeting_transcript for the transcript.

parameters.name: meeting_id
parameters.description: Granola note ID in format 'not_<14 chars>' (e.g. 'not_XXXXXXXXXXXXXX').

output.description: Full meeting metadata including attendees and calendar event.

tools.name: GetMeetingTranscript
tools.description:
Get the verbatim transcript for a Granola meeting, with speaker labels and timestamps.

Returns all segments by default. Use speaker_filter to narrow to a single speaker.
Note: transcripts can be large for long meetings.

parameters.name: meeting_id
parameters.description: Granola note ID in format 'not_<14 chars>' (e.g. 'not_XXXXXXXXXXXXXX').

parameters.name: speaker_filter
parameters.description: Filter by speaker name (case-insensitive match). Leave empty to return all speakers.

output.description: Transcript segments with speaker labels and timestamps.

tools.name: ListMeetings
tools.description:
List Granola meetings, optionally filtered by date range, with cursor pagination.

Returns metadata only — no notes or transcript content. Results are newest first.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Only return meetings created on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Leave empty for no lower bound.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Only return meetings created before this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Leave empty for no upper bound.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page (1-30). Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous list_meetings call. Leave empty for the first page.

output.description: List of meetings with metadata and pagination cursor.
